practiceChallenge.title: Fill in the top-k heap helper
practiceChallenge.description: Complete the helper so it describes the right heap rule for keeping the k largest values.
hints: Use a min-heap for current top-k largest survivors.
If the heap grows past k, remove the smallest survivor.
The top is the weakest of the current best group.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Nice work. You rebuilt the main top-k heap rule.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Not yet. Recheck which heap keeps the weakest top-k survivor easy to remove.

blanks.label: Heap type for k largest survivors
What to remove when heap size goes past k
What the top means in the current top-k heap
